session.user: Run ruff lint check on the two specific files and report results. Execute: `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py tests/core/test_plan_context_provider.py` from `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff lint check on those two specific files for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff lint check on two specific files

session.assistant:
ruff passed: All checks passed!
Both files passed the ruff lint check with no violations detected: - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py` - `tests/core/test_plan_context_provider.py`
